item.title: Tesla settles FSD crash lawsuit as federal investigations continue
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: The lawsuit was connected to a fatal 2023 crash involving a vehicle using the company's advanced driver assistance system known as Full Self-Driving.

item.title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.

item.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

item.title: Xprize founder says ‘humans behave better when they’re being watched’
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: Peter Diamandis is the latest tech executive to argue that global surveillance will make the world a better place, following Larry Ellison's comments in 2024.

item.title: Robotaxis drive miles just to get cleaned and charged; this new startup wants to fix that
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: Aseon Labs, which came out of Y Combinator's 2026 spring cohort, has raised $10 million from Crane Venture Partners and others.

item.title: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

item.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

item.title: YouTube Shorts are getting even shorter with an update that lets you double the playback speed
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: YouTube Shorts is getting a makeover.

item.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

item.title: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
item.dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
item.description: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third-party breach.

item.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

item.title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: The company said it is discontinuing its email inbox in favor of its AI agent offering as users are increasingly handing over the reins of their email to the agents.

item.title: a16z-backed Base Power is offering cheaper electricity to the power grid that needs it most
item.dc:creator: Tim De Chant
item.description: Base Power is skipping the PJM's troubled interconnection queue by placing its batteries at people's homes, offering backup services in exchange.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

item.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
item.description: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

item.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

item.title: Hacked Klue says criminals are deleting stolen customer data, but now other hackers are making threats
item.dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
item.description: Market research company Klue told customers that it believes the hacking group that stole their data is now deleting it. The company, however, warned about a second group of hackers wanting ransom.

item.title: Rippling now wants to be your entire data stack
item.dc:creator: Connie Loizos
item.description: "There were employees doing things like, 'Claude is so helpful for me — it analyzes my calendar and my email and puts together a plan for me,'" he says. "That person was spending at a run rate of $30,000 a year for this."

item.title: Google Finance gets a dedicated app for Android
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: Users will be able to access their watchlists, real-time market data, live financial news, and Google's AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, which explains why stocks moved.

item.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
item.dc:creator: Ram Iyer
item.description: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.
